achievements.title: Mini Mario vs. Yoshi's Island
achievements.description: Without returning to the main menu, clear each of the 5 stages in Yoshi's Island entirely as small Mario without using checkpoints, Starmen, or Yoshis.
achievements.author: AuburnRDM

achievements.title: Mini Mario vs. Donut Plains
achievements.description: Without returning to the main menu, clear each of the 9 stages in Donut Plains entirely as small Mario without using checkpoints, Starmen, or Yoshis.
achievements.author: AuburnRDM

achievements.title: Mini Mario vs. Vanilla Dome
achievements.description: Without returning to the main menu, clear each of the 10 stages in Vanilla Dome entirely as small Mario without using checkpoints, Starmen, or Yoshis.
achievements.author: AuburnRDM

achievements.title: Mini Mario vs. Twin Bridges
achievements.description: Without returning to the main menu, clear each of the 6 stages in Twin Bridges entirely as small Mario without using checkpoints, Starmen, or Yoshis.
achievements.author: AuburnRDM

achievements.title: Mini Mario vs. Forest of Illusion
achievements.description: Without returning to the main menu, clear each of the 8 stages in Forest of Illusion entirely as small Mario without using checkpoints, Starmen, or Yoshis.
achievements.author: AuburnRDM

achievements.title: Mini Mario vs. Chocolate Island
achievements.description: Without returning to the main menu, clear each of the 9 stages in Chocolate Island entirely as small Mario without using checkpoints, Starmen, or Yoshis.
achievements.author: AuburnRDM

achievements.title: Mini Mario vs. Valley of Bowser
achievements.description: Without returning to the main menu, clear each of the 8 stages in Valley of Bowser entirely as small Mario without using checkpoints, Starmen, or Yoshis. (No Back Door)
achievements.author: AuburnRDM

achievements.title: Mini Mario vs. Special World
achievements.description: Without returning to the main menu, clear each of the 8 stages in Special World entirely as small Mario without using checkpoints, Starmen, or Yoshis.
achievements.author: AuburnRDM
